title: lantana chamissonis
intro: Lantana chamissonis, also known as yellow loosestrife, is a flowering shrub native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Lantana chamissonis include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Lantana chamissonis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and wellness.
